specific_question: By Q3 2026, how many AI-assisted predictive maintenance models will the asset lifecycle management team at Elexion Automotive have tested to improve asset uptime for EV production lines?
answer: According to Elexion Automotive's internal report forecast, by September 30, 2026, the asset management team will have tested 18 AI-assisted predictive maintenance models to enhance uptime and reduce unplanned downtime across the firm's production facilities.
dr_question: By Q3 2026, how can Elexion Automotive apply digital twins enhanced with AI-driven digital engineering capabilities to enable scalable customization of EV models for mid-income families, while maintaining sustainable resource usage and reducing production costs?
